word: G2119 - εὐκαιρέω - eukairéō - yoo-kahee-reh'-o - Have leisure

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὐκαιρέω

- Transliteration: Eukaireo

- Phonetic: yoo-kahee-reh'-o

- Definition:

1. to have opportunity

2. to have leisure

3. to do something

4. to give one's time to a thing

- Origin: from G2121

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2121; to have good time that is opportunity or leisure: - have leisure (convenient time) spend time.
